title: elaphoglossum subandinum
intro: Elaphoglossum subandinum is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, commonly found in the Andes mountain range. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum subandinum include reducing fever and relieving pain, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antifungal properties. Elaphoglossum subandinum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are often used to treat various ailments in traditional medicine.
